title: Mega Gardevoir Battle Guide
summary: The benchmark [pixilate] spread attacker — [hyper-voice] converts into a boosted [Fairy] STAB spread move off a 165 Special Attack stat.
strengths: 165 Special Attack is the highest among practical Mega attackers
weaknesses: Speed 100 is outpaced by Scarf users
Physical bulk 68/65 folds to priority attacks

recommendedMoves.reason: Hits special walls like [blissey] on their Def

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Gardevoir is the benchmark [pixilate] spread attacker. The ability turns [normal]-type moves into [fairy] with a 1.2x boost, so [hyper-voice] becomes a spread [fairy] STAB with four stacking bonuses: 165 Special Attack, STAB, pixilate boost, and multi-target damage. In doubles, [hyper-voice] is one of the strongest spread moves in the metagame.

## Strengths
[hyper-voice] hits through [substitute] because it is a sound move, so setup threats cannot wall it behind a [substitute]. 165 Special Attack is tied for the highest on any practical Mega attacker, and the [Psychic]/[Fairy] typing gives clean immunity to [dragon] and [fighting] plus a solid resistance list.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Steel] and [Poison] walls resist [hyper-voice] hard, and [ghost] attackers like [gengar] punish the [psychic] side. Physical bulk is 68/65, so any priority move ([bullet-punch], [sucker-punch], [shadow-sneak]) is a serious threat. Speed 100 loses to Scarf attackers and the top tier of natural speed.

## Recommended Moveset
[hyper-voice] is the whole game plan. [psyshock] targets Defense to break special walls and hit [Poison]-types (many of which have weaker Def). [moonblast] is single-target [fairy] STAB with higher BP for concentrated damage. [protect] is mandatory in doubles for Mega turn safety and partner setup.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[gardevoirite] is mandatory. [pixilate] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [Fairy] stacks on top of [pixilate] for maximum [hyper-voice] damage; Tera [Psychic] boosts [psyshock] instead for a [Poison]-breaking plan.

## Teammates & Synergy
A [tailwind] setter solves the Speed 100 problem. [incineroar]'s [intimidate] buys physical bulk. Partners with [telepathy] (like [metagross]) ignore [hyper-voice] ally damage so you can fire freely without friendly fire.

## Play Patterns
Protect on the Mega turn, then spam [hyper-voice] into the opponent's pair. Switch to [psyshock] or [moonblast] when a [Poison] type is present. Keep it behind a bulky teammate to avoid priority KOs, and save Tera for an emergency damage boost.
